description: Lean 4 retranslation of Verus vstd arithmetic as a theory-heavy benchmark with checked-overflow API obligations.

notes: Most arithmetic lemmas are theorem-only Verus proof obligations; Overflow APIs are constrained by RepoImpl-dependent specs mirroring overflow.rs method postconditions.
